songs.title: Outbound
feed: “Outbound” by After spends a 3rd week at #1 in the Personal Hot 100.
“Outbound” by After is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 129 sales units.
“Outbound” by After is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 245 streams units.
“Outbound” by After is the #1 most airplayed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 6 airplay units.
“Outbound” by After is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 619,892 total units.
